tris += [tri((x0,y1,z0),(x1,y1,z1),(x0,y1,z1)),\n             tri((x0,y1,z0),(x1,y1,z0),(x1,y1,z1))]\n    # left (x=x0)\n    tris += [tri((x0,y0,z0),(x0,y1,z0),(x0,y1,z1)),\n             tri((x0,y0,z0),(x0,y1,z1),(x0,y0,z1))]\n    # right (x=x1)\n    tris += [tri((x1,y0,z0),(x1,y1,z1),(x1,y1,z0)),\n             tri((x1,y0,z0),(x1,y0,z1),(x1,y1,z1))]\n    return tris\n\ndef cylinder(cx, cy, z0, z1, r, n_seg=24, inner_r=0):\n    \"\"\"Upright cylinder (or annulus if inner_r>0), n_seg facets.\"\"\"\n    tris = []\n    for i in range(n_seg):\n        a0 = 2*math.pi * i     / n_seg\n        a1 = 2*math.pi * (i+1) / n_seg\n        # outer surface\n        p0 = (cx+r*math.cos(a0), cy+r*math.sin(a0), z0)\n        p1 = (cx+r*math.cos(a1), cy+r*math.sin(a1), z0)\n        p2 = (cx+r*math.cos(a1), cy+r*math.sin(a1), z1)\n        p3 = (cx+r*math.cos(a0), cy+r*math.sin(a0), z1)\n        tris += [tri(p0, p1, p2), tri(p0, p2, p3)]\n        if inner_r > 0:\n            q0 = (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a0), cy+inner_r*math.sin(a0), z0)\n            q1 = (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1), cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1), z0)\n            q2 = (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1), cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1), z1)\n            q3 = (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a0), cy+inner_r*math.sin(a0), z1)\n            tris += [tri(q1, q0, q3), tri(q1, q3, q2)]\n            # top and bottom annular caps\n            tris += [tri((cx+r*math.cos(a0),cy+r*math.sin(a0),z1),\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1),z1),\n                         (cx+r*math.cos(a1),cy+r*math.sin(a1),z1)),\n                     tri((cx+r*math.cos(a0),cy+r*math.sin(a0),z1),\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a0),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a0),z1),\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1),z1))]\n            tris += [tri((cx+r*math.cos(a0),cy+r*math.sin(a0),z0),\n                         (cx+r*math.cos(a1),cy+r*math.sin(a1),z0),\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1),z0)),\n                     tri((cx+r*math.cos(a0),cy+r*math.sin(a0),z0),\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1),z0),\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a0),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a0),z0))]\n        else:\n            # solid cap top/bottom\n            tris += [tri((cx,cy,z1), p3, p2),\n                     tri((cx,cy,z0), p1, p0)]\n    return tris\n\ndef spur_gear(cx, cy, z0, z1, r_pitch, teeth, module=0.5, n_seg=8):\n    \"\"\"Simplified involute-approximation spur gear.\"\"\"\n    tris = []\n    r_base   = r_pitch - module * 1.25  # dedendum\n    r_tip    = r_pitch + module          # addendum\n    r_root   = r_base * 0.95\n    pitch_a  = 2*math.pi / teeth\n    half_tooth = 0.3 * pitch_a  # simplified tooth width\n    for t in range(teeth):\n        base_a = t * pitch_a\n        # Tooth profile (simplified)\n        for i in range(n_seg):\n            a0 = base_a + (i   / n_seg) * pitch_a\n            a1 = base_a + ((i+1) / n_seg) * pitch_a\n            if abs(a0 - (base_a + pitch_a/2)) < half_tooth:\n                r0, r1 = r_tip, r_tip\n            else:\n                r0 = r_base if i < n_seg//4 or i > 3*n_seg//4 else r_pitch\n                r1 = r_base if (i+1) < n_seg//4 or (i+1) > 3*n_seg//4 else r_pitch\n            p0 = (cx+r0*math.cos(a0), cy+r0*math.sin(a0), z0)\n            p1 = (cx+r1*math.cos(a1), cy+r1*math.sin(a1), z0)\n            p2 = (cx+r1*math.cos(a1), cy+r1*math.sin(a1), z1)\n            p3 = (cx+r0*math.cos(a0), cy+r0*math.sin(a0), z1)\n            tris += [tri(p0,p1,p2), tri(p0,p2,p3)]\n            # caps\n            tris += [tri((cx,cy,z0), p1, p0), tri((cx,cy,z1), p3, p2)]\n    # Bore hole (3mm)\n    tris += cylinder(cx, cy, z0, z1, 1.5, 16)  # bore as solid \u2014 subtract in slicer\n    return tris\n\ndef sector_gear(cx, cy, z0, z1, r_pitch, arc_deg, module=0.5):\n    \"\"\"Sector gear: arc_deg of spur gear with hub.\"\"\"\n    tris = []\n    arc_rad = math.radians(arc_deg)\n    teeth_in_arc = max(1, int(arc_deg * r_pitch / (module * 180 / math.pi)))\n    pitch_a = arc_rad / max(1, teeth_in_arc)\n    r_base = r_pitch - module * 1.25\n    r_tip  = r_pitch + module\n    hub_r  = 6.0   # 6mm hub\n    # Tooth faces\n    for t in range(teeth_in_arc):\n        a0 = t * pitch_a\n        a1 = (t+1) * pitch_a\n        am = (a0+a1)/2\n        for i, (a, r) in enumerate([(a0, r_base), (am*0.9, r_pitch),\n                                     (am, r_tip), (am*1.1, r_pitch), (a1, r_base)]):\n            if i == 0: continue\n            pa = (a0 if i == 0 else (a0,am*0.9,am,am*1.1,a1)[i-1])\n            ra = (r_base if i==0 else (r_base,r_pitch,r_tip,r_pitch,r_base)[i-1])\n            pb = a; rb = r\n            v0 = (cx+ra*math.cos(pa), cy+ra*math.sin(pa), z0)\n            v1 = (cx+rb*math.cos(pb), cy+rb*math.sin(pb), z0)\n            v2 = (cx+rb*math.cos(pb), cy+rb*math.sin(pb), z1)\n            v3 = (cx+ra*math.cos(pa), cy+ra*math.sin(pa), z1)\n            tris += [tri(v0,v1,v2), tri(v0,v2,v3)]\n    # Hub disc\n    tris += cylinder(cx, cy, z0, z1, hub_r, 16)\n    # Radial sides (close the sector)\n    for a_end in [0, arc_rad]:\n        for rr in [(hub_r, r_base)]:\n            v0 = (cx+rr[0]*math.cos(a_end), cy+rr[0]*math.sin(a_end), z0)\n            v1 = (cx+rr[1]*math.cos(a_end), cy+rr[1]*math.sin(a_end), z0)\n            v2 = (cx+rr[1]*math.cos(a_end), cy+rr[1]*math.sin(a_end), z1)\n            v3 = (cx+rr[0]*math.cos(a_end), cy+rr[0]*math.sin(a_end), z1)\n            tris += [tri(v0,v1,v2), tri(v0,v2,v3)]\n    return tris\n\ndef shell_section(profile_pts, z0, z1, wall=1.5, n_seg_circ=32):\n    \"\"\"\n    Hollow shell section from a 2D profile (list of (x,y) half-width points at each z-station).\n    profile_pts: [(x_station, half_width_mm), ...]  -- outer surface\n    Returns triangles for outer and inner surfaces plus top/bottom annular caps.\n    \"\"\"\n    tris = []\n    outer = profile_pts\n    inner = [(x, max(0.5, y - wall)) for x,y in outer]\n    # Longitudinal panels\n    for i in range(len(outer)-1):\n        x0o, y0o = outer[i];   x1o, y1o = outer[i+1]\n        x0i, y0i = inner[i];   x1i, y1i = inner[i+1]\n        # For circular cross-section: revolve each station\n        for j in range(n_seg_circ):\n            a0 = 2*math.pi*j/n_seg_circ\n            a1 = 2*math.pi*(j+1)/n_seg_circ\n            # Outer surface quad between stations i and i+1\n            A = (x0o, y0o*math.cos(a0), y0o*math.sin(a0))\n            B = (x1o, y1o*math.cos(a0), y1o*math.sin(a0))\n            C = (x1o, y1o*math.cos(a1), y1o*math.sin(a1))\n            D = (x0o, y0o*math.cos(a1), y0o*math.sin(a1))\n            tris += [tri(A,B,C), tri(A,C,D)]\n            # Inner surface (reversed normals)\n            Ai = (x0i, y0i*math.cos(a0), y0i*math.sin(a0))\n            Bi = (x1i, y1i*math.cos(a0), y1i*math.sin(a0))\n            Ci = (x1i, y1i*math.cos(a1), y1i*math.sin(a1))\n            Di = (x0i, y0i*math.cos(a1), y0i*math.sin(a1))\n            tris += [tri(A,D,C), tri(A,C,B)]  # inner reversed\n    # End caps (annular)\n    for (cap_outer, cap_inner) in [(outer[0], inner[0]), (outer[-1], inner[-1])]:\n        x_c, yo, yi = cap_outer[0], cap_outer[1], cap_inner[1]\n        for j in range(n_seg_circ):\n            a0 = 2*math.pi*j/n_seg_circ\n            a1 = 2*math.pi*(j+1)/n_seg_circ\n            Po  = (x_c, yo*math.cos(a0), yo*math.sin(a0))\n            Po2 = (x_c, yo*math.cos(a1), yo*math.sin(a1))\n            Pi  = (x_c, yi*math.cos(a0), yi*math.sin(a0))\n            Pi2 = (x_c, yi*math.cos(a1), yi*math.sin(a1))\n            tris += [tri(Po, Po2, Pi2), tri(Po, Pi2, Pi)]\n    return tris\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 hull profile (mm from nose, half-width mm) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\nHULL_PROFILE = [\n    (0,0),(8,10),(22,18),(40,30),(58,36),(88,37),\n    (120,42),(140,42),(165,40),(190,36),(220,29),\n    (252,18),(260,16),(278,24),(305,29),(330,28),(365,22),\n]\n\ndef hull_section(x_from, x_to, wall=1.5, seg=24):\n    pts = [(x,w) for x,w in HULL_PROFILE if x_from <= x <= x_to]\n    if len(pts) < 2:\n        # interpolate\n        all_x = [p[0] for p in HULL_PROFILE]\n        all_w = [p[1] for p in HULL_PROFILE]\n        pts = [(x_from, 0)] + pts + [(x_to, 0)]\n    return shell_section(pts, 0, 1, wall=wall, n_seg_circ=seg)\n\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n# Part definitions\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\nparts = {}\n\n# Hull sections\nparts[\"hull_cockpit_cap\"] = \\\n    shell_section([(x,w) for x,w in HULL_PROFILE if x <= 22], 0, 1, wall=1.5, n_seg_circ=32)\n\nparts[\"hull_cockpit_section\"] = \\\n    shell_section([(x,w) for x,w in HULL_PROFILE if 22 <= x <= 90], 0, 1, wall=1.5, n_seg_circ=32)\n\nparts[\"hull_mid_body_left\"] = \\\n    shell_section([(x,w) for x,w in HULL_PROFILE if 90 <= x <= 230], 0, 1, wall=1.5, n_seg_circ=32)\n\nparts[\"hull_mid_body_right\"] = \\\n    shell_section([(x,w) for x,w in HULL_PROFILE if 90 <= x <= 230], 0, 1, wall=1.5, n_seg_circ=32)\n\nparts[\"hull_aft_neck\"] = \\\n    shell_section([(x,w) for x,w in HULL_PROFILE if 230 <= x <= 270], 0, 1, wall=1.5, n_seg_circ=32)\n\n# Engine bell: annular shell around the 40mm EDF\nparts[\"hull_engine_bell\"] = cylinder(0, 0, 0, 50, 38, n_seg=32, inner_r=22)\n\n# Nacelle pod: 70mm EDF, 120mm long, 40mm OD, 36mm ID\nparts[\"nacelle_pod_70mm\"] = cylinder(0, 0, 0, 120, 40, cylinder(0, 0, 0, 4, 10, n_seg=16) +         # pivot bore\n    box(-24, -3, 12, 24, 3, 16)                   # spar clamp wings\n)\n\n# Sector gear R=22mm, 90\u00b0 arc, M0.5, 4mm thick\nparts[\"sector_gear_22mm\"] = sector_gear(0, 0, 0, 4, 22, 90, module=0.5)\n\n# Nozzle inner ring 70mm ID\nparts[\"nozzle_inner_ring_70mm\"] = cylinder(0, 0, 0, 12, 36, n_seg=36, inner_r=35)\n\n# Nozzle flap \u00d7 8 (10mm chord, 5mm span, 2mm thick) \u2014 one flap\nparts[\"nozzle_flap_x8\"] = box(0, 0, 0, 10, 2, 5)\n\n# Nozzle outer housing 22, n_seg=32, inner_r=21)\n\n# Nozzle outer housing 40mm\nparts[\"nozzle_outer_housing_40mm\"] = cylinder(0, 0, 0, 18, 25, n_seg=32, inner_r=22)\n\n# Bevel gear housing block\nparts[\"bevel_gear_housing\"] = (\n    box(-10, -10, 0, 10, 10, 20) +\n    cylinder(0, 0, 0, 20, 1.5, n_seg=12)  # bore through for shaft\n)\n\n# Pinion-A bracket\nparts[\"pinion_a_bracket\"] = (\n    box(-12, -8, 0, 12, 8, 14) +\n    cylinder(0, 0, 0, 14, 1.5, n_seg=12)\n)\n\n# Dorsal antenna fin (PETG, 35mm tall \u00d7 20mm base \u00d7 4mm thick)\nparts[\"dorsal_antenna_fin\"] = (\n    box(-10, -2, 0, 10, 2, 35) +       # main fin\n    box(-10, -2, 0, 10, 2, 12) +        # base reinforcement (extra wall)\n    cylinder(0, 0, 8, 35, 1.5, n_seg=8) # coil cavity (bore)\n)\n\n# Payload bay door (PETG, 112\u00d742mm \u00d7 2mm thick)\nparts[\"payload_bay_door\"] = (\n    box(0, 0, 0, 112, 42, 2) +\n    cylinder(56, 21, 1.5, 2, 2, n_seg=8)  # hinge pin boss\n)\n\n# Landing skid foot (TPU 95A, 44mm \u00d7 20mm \u00d7 8mm)\nparts[\"landing_skid_foot\"] = (\n    box(0, 0, 0, 44, 20, 8) +\n    box(10, 18, 0, 34, 22, 6)    # skid rail channel\n)\n\n# Cockpit dome (clear PETG, hemisphere ~45mm dia \u00d7 32mm tall)\ndome = []\nn_az, n_el = 32, 16\nrx, ry, rz = 44, 24, 32   # semi-axes of cockpit dome\nfor i in range(n_az):\n    for j in range(n_el):\n        a0 = 2*math.pi*i/n_az\n        a1 = 2*math.pi*(i+1)/n_az\n        e0 = math.pi/2*j/n_el\n        e1 = math.pi/2*(j+1)/n_el\n        p = [\n            (rx*math.cos(a0)*math.cos(e0), ry*math.sin(a0)*math.cos(e0), rz*math.sin(e0)),\n            (rx*math.cos(a1)*math.cos(e0), ry*math.sin(a1)*math.cos(e0), rz*math.sin(e0)),\n            (rx*math.cos(a1)*math.cos(e1), = [((1-1.2/max(rx,ry,rz))*x, (1-1.2/max(rx,ry,rz))*y, (1-1.2/max(rx,ry,rz))*z) for x,y,z in p]\n        dome += [tri(p[0],p[1],p[2]), tri(p[0],p[2],p[3])]\n        dome += [tri(pi2[2],pi2[1],pi2[0]), tri(pi2[3],pi2[2],pi2[0])]\nparts[\"cockpit_dome_clear\"] = dome\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 write STL files name, tris in parts.items():\n    content = solid(name, tris)\n    path = os.path.join(ROOT, f\"{name}.stl\")\n    with open(path, \"w\") as f:\n        f.write(content)\n    print(f\"Written: {path}  ({len(tris)} triangles  {len(content):,} bytes)\")\n\nprint(f\"\\nAll {len(parts)} STL files written.\")\nPYEOF\npython3 /home/claude/gen_stl.py 2>&1 | head -40",

      "json_block": "{\"language\": \"bash\", \"code\": \"cat << 'PYEOF' > /home/claude/gen_stl.py\\n#!/usr/bin/env python3\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"Generate ASCII STL files for 3D-printed parts of the Serenity-class tiltrotor UAV.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\nimport math, os\\n\\nROOT = \\\"/home/claude/serenity-drone/stl\\\"\\nos.makedirs(ROOT, exist_ok=True)\\n\\nCC = \\\"\\\"\\\"solid serenity_tiltrotor_part\\n; Copyright 2025 Steve Griffing, PE(CSE) [Control Systems Engineering], CISSP-ISSEP, CPP\\n; License: CC BY 4.0  https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/\\n; Hull basis: Peter Farell CC BY 4.0 | printables.com/model/548545\\n; Nozzle basis: BamJr CC BY 4.0    | thingiverse.com/thing:2991269\\n; Visual inspiration: Firefly/Serenity (C) Joss Whedon/Mutant Enemy/Universal Pictures\\n; Fan engineering work -- not an officially licensed product.\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\ndef vec_normal(v1, v2, v3):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Compute unit normal of triangle.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    u = (v2[0]-v1[0], v2[1]-v1[1], v2[2]-v1[2])\\n    v = (v3[0]-v1[0], v3[1]-v1[1], v3[2]-v1[2])\\n    n = (u[1]*v[2]-u[2]*v[1], u[2]*v[0]-u[0]*v[2], u[0]*v[1]-u[1]*v[0])\\n    mag = math.sqrt(sum(x*x for x in n)) or 1e-10\\n    return tuple(x/mag for x in n)\\n\\ndef tri(v1, v2, v3):\\n    n = vec_normal(v1, v2, v3)\\n    return (f\\\"  facet normal {n[0]:.6f} {n[1]:.6f} {n[2]:.6f}\\\\n\\\"\\n            f\\\"    outer loop\\\\n\\\"\\n            f\\\"      vertex {v1[0]:.4f} {v1[1]:.4f} {v1[2]:.4f}\\\\n\\\"\\n            f\\\"      vertex {v2[0]:.4f} {v2[1]:.4f} {v2[2]:.4f}\\\\n\\\"\\n            f\\\"      vertex {v3[0]:.4f} {v3[1]:.4f} {v3[2]:.4f}\\\\n\\\"\\n            f\\\"    endloop\\\\n  endfacet\\\\n\\\")\\n\\ndef solid(name, triangles):\\n    body = \\\"\\\".join(triangles)\\n    return f\\\"solid {name}\\\\n{body}endsolid {name}\\\\n\\\"\\n\\ndef box(x0,y0,z0, x1,y1,z1):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Axis-aligned box (12 triangles).\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    tris = []\\n    # bottom (z=z0)\\n    tris += [tri((x0,y0,z0),(x1,y0,z0),(x1,y1,z0)),\\n             tri((x0,y0,z0),(x1,y1,z0),(x0,y1,z0))]\\n    # top (z=z1)\\n    tris += [tri((x0,y0,z1),(x1,y1,z1),(x1,y0,z1)),\\n             tri((x0,y0,z1),(x0,y1,z1),(x1,y1,z1))]\\n    # front (y=y0)\\n    tris += [tri((x0,y0,z0),(x0,y0,z1),(x1,y0,z1)),\\n             tri((x0,y0,z0),(x1,y0,z1),(x1,y0,z0))]\\n    # back (y=y1)\\n    tris += [tri((x0,y1,z0),(x1,y1,z1),(x0,y1,z1)),\\n             tri((x0,y1,z0),(x1,y1,z0),(x1,y1,z1))]\\n    # left (x=x0)\\n    tris += [tri((x0,y0,z0),(x0,y1,z0),(x0,y1,z1)),\\n             tri((x0,y0,z0),(x0,y1,z1),(x0,y0,z1))]\\n    # right (x=x1)\\n    tris += [tri((x1,y0,z0),(x1,y1,z1),(x1,y1,z0)),\\n             tri((x1,y0,z0),(x1,y0,z1),(x1,y1,z1))]\\n    return tris\\n\\ndef cylinder(cx, cy, z0, z1, r, n_seg=24, inner_r=0):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Upright cylinder (or annulus if inner_r>0), n_seg facets.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    tris = []\\n    for i in range(n_seg):\\n        a0 = 2*math.pi * i     / n_seg\\n        a1 = 2*math.pi * (i+1) / n_seg\\n        # outer surface\\n        p0 = (cx+r*math.cos(a0), cy+r*math.sin(a0), z0)\\n        p1 = (cx+r*math.cos(a1), cy+r*math.sin(a1), z0)\\n        p2 = (cx+r*math.cos(a1), cy+r*math.sin(a1), z1)\\n        p3 = (cx+r*math.cos(a0), cy+r*math.sin(a0), z1)\\n        tris += [tri(p0, p1, p2), tri(p0, p2, p3)]\\n        if inner_r > 0:\\n            q0 = (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a0), cy+inner_r*math.sin(a0), z0)\\n            q1 = (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1), cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1), z0)\\n            q2 = (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1), cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1), z1)\\n            q3 = (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a0), cy+inner_r*math.sin(a0), z1)\\n            tris += [tri(q1, q0, q3), tri(q1, q3, q2)]\\n            # top and bottom annular caps\\n            tris += [tri((cx+r*math.cos(a0),cy+r*math.sin(a0),z1),\\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1),z1),\\n                         (cx+r*math.cos(a1),cy+r*math.sin(a1),z1)),\\n                     tri((cx+r*math.cos(a0),cy+r*math.sin(a0),z1),\\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a0),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a0),z1),\\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1),z1))]\\n            tris += [tri((cx+r*math.cos(a0),cy+r*math.sin(a0),z0),\\n                         (cx+r*math.cos(a1),cy+r*math.sin(a1),z0),\\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1),z0)),\\n                     tri((cx+r*math.cos(a0),cy+r*math.sin(a0),z0),\\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a1),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a1),z0),\\n                         (cx+inner_r*math.cos(a0),cy+inner_r*math.sin(a0),z0))]\\n        else:\\n            # solid cap top/bottom\\n            tris += [tri((cx,cy,z1), p3, p2),\\n                     tri((cx,cy,z0), p1, p0)]\\n    return tris\\n\\ndef spur_gear(cx, cy, z0, z1, r_pitch, teeth, module=0.5, n_seg=8):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Simplified involute-approximation spur gear.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    tris = []\\n    r_base   = r_pitch - module * 1.25  # dedendum\\n    r_tip    = r_pitch + module          # addendum\\n    r_root   = r_base * 0.95\\n    pitch_a  = 2*math.pi / teeth\\n    half_tooth = 0.3 * pitch_a  # simplified tooth width\\n    for t in range(teeth):\\n        base_a = t * pitch_a\\n        # Tooth profile (simplified)\\n        for i in range(n_seg):\\n            a0 = base_a + (i   / n_seg) * pitch_a\\n            a1 = base_a + ((i+1) / n_seg) * pitch_a\\n            if abs(a0 - (base_a + pitch_a/2)) < half_tooth:\\n                r0, r1 = r_tip, r_tip\\n            else:\\n                r0 = r_base if i < n_seg//4 or i > 3*n_seg//4 else r_pitch\\n                r1 = r_base if (i+1) < n_seg//4 or (i+1) > 3*n_seg//4 else r_pitch\\n            p0 = (cx+r0*math.cos(a0), cy+r0*math.sin(a0), z0)\\n            p1 = (cx+r1*math.cos(a1), cy+r1*math.sin(a1), z0)\\n            p2 = (cx+r1*math.cos(a1), cy+r1*math.sin(a1), z1)\\n            p3 = (cx+r0*math.cos(a0), cy+r0*math.sin(a0), z1)\\n            tris += [tri(p0,p1,p2), tri(p0,p2,p3)]\\n            # caps\\n            tris += [tri((cx,cy,z0), p1, p0), tri((cx,cy,z1), p3, p2)]\\n    # Bore hole (3mm)\\n    tris += cylinder(cx, cy, z0, z1, 1.5, 16)  # bore as solid \\u2014 subtract in slicer\\n    return tris\\n\\ndef sector_gear(cx, cy, z0, z1, r_pitch, arc_deg, module=0.5):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Sector gear: arc_deg of spur gear with hub.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    tris = []\\n    arc_rad = math.radians(arc_deg)\\n    teeth_in_arc = max(1, int(arc_deg * r_pitch / (module * 180 / math.pi)))\\n    pitch_a = arc_rad / max(1, teeth_in_arc)\\n    r_base = r_pitch - module * 1.25\\n    r_tip  = r_pitch + module\\n    hub_r  = 6.0   # 6mm hub\\n    # Tooth faces\\n    for t in range(teeth_in_arc):\\n        a0 = t * pitch_a\\n        a1 = (t+1) * pitch_a\\n        am = (a0+a1)/2\\n        for i, (a, r) in enumerate([(a0, r_base), (am*0.9, r_pitch),\\n                                     (am, r_tip), (am*1.1, r_pitch), (a1, r_base)]):\\n            if i == 0: continue\\n            pa = (a0 if i == 0 else (a0,am*0.9,am,am*1.1,a1)[i-1])\\n            ra = (r_base if i==0 else (r_base,r_pitch,r_tip,r_pitch,r_base)[i-1])\\n            pb = a; rb = r\\n            v0 = (cx+ra*math.cos(pa), cy+ra*math.sin(pa), z0)\\n            v1 = (cx+rb*math.cos(pb), cy+rb*math.sin(pb), z0)\\n            v2 = (cx+rb*math.cos(pb), cy+rb*math.sin(pb), z1)\\n            v3 = (cx+ra*math.cos(pa), cy+ra*math.sin(pa), z1)\\n            tris += [tri(v0,v1,v2), tri(v0,v2,v3)]\\n    # Hub disc\\n    tris += cylinder(cx, cy, z0, z1, hub_r, 16)\\n    # Radial sides (close the sector)\\n    for a_end in [0, arc_rad]:\\n        for rr in [(hub_r, r_base)]:\\n            v0 = (cx+rr[0]*math.cos(a_end), cy+rr[0]*math.sin(a_end), z0)\\n            v1 = (cx+rr[1]*math.cos(a_end), cy+rr[1]*math.sin(a_end), z0)\\n            v2 = (cx+rr[1]*math.cos(a_end), cy+rr[1]*math.sin(a_end), z1)\\n            v3 = (cx+rr[0]*math.cos(a_end), cy+rr[0]*math.sin(a_end), z1)\\n            tris += [tri(v0,v1,v2), tri(v0,v2,v3)]\\n    return tris\\n\\ndef shell_section(profile_pts, z0, z1, wall=1.5, n_seg_circ=32):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    Hollow shell section from a 2D profile (list of (x,y) half-width points at each z-station).\\n    profile_pts: [(x_station, half_width_mm), ...]  -- outer surface\\n    Returns triangles for outer and inner surfaces plus top/bottom annular caps.\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    tris = []\\n    outer = profile_pts\\n    inner = [(x, max(0.5, y - wall)) for x,y in outer]\\n    # Longitudinal panels\\n    for i in range(len(outer)-1):\\n        x0o, y0o = outer[i];   x1o, y1o = outer[i+1]\\n        x0i, y0i = inner[i];   x1i, y1i = inner[i+1]\\n        # For circular cross-section: revolve each station\\n        for j in range(n_seg_circ):\\n            a0 = 2*math.pi*j/n_seg_circ\\n            a1 = 2*math.pi*(j+1)/n_seg_circ\\n            # Outer surface quad between stations i and i+1\\n            A = (x0o, y0o*math.cos(a0), y0o*math.sin(a0))\\n            B = (x1o, y1o*math.cos(a0), y1o*math.sin(a0))\\n            C = (x1o, y1o*math.cos(a1), y1o*math.sin(a1))\\n            D = (x0o, y0o*math.cos(a1), y0o*math.sin(a1))\\n            tris += [tri(A,B,C), tri(A,C,D)]\\n            # Inner surface (reversed normals)\\n            Ai = (x0i, y0i*math.cos(a0), y0i*math.sin(a0))\\n            Bi = (x1i, y1i*math.cos(a0), y1i*math.sin(a0))\\n            Ci = (x1i, y1i*math.cos(a1), y1i*math.sin(a1))\\n            Di = (x0i, y0i*math.cos(a1), y0i*math.sin(a1))\\n            tris += [tri(A,D,C), tri(A,C,B)]  # inner reversed\\n    # End caps (annular)\\n    for (cap_outer, cap_inner) in [(outer[0], inner[0]), (outer[-1], inner[-1])]:\\n        x_c, yo, yi = cap_outer[0], cap_outer[1], cap_inner[1]\\n        for j in range(n_seg_circ):\\n            a0 = 2*math.pi*j/n_seg_circ\\n            a1 = 2*math.pi*(j+1)/n_seg_circ\\n            Po  = (x_c, yo*math.cos(a0), yo*math.sin(a0))\\n            Po2 = (x_c, yo*math.cos(a1), yo*math.sin(a1))\\n            Pi  = (x_c, yi*math.cos(a0), yi*math.sin(a0))\\n            Pi2 = (x_c, yi*math.cos(a1), yi*math.sin(a1))\\n            tris += [tri(Po, Po2, Pi2), tri(Po, Pi2, Pi)]\\n    return tris\\n\\n# \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500 hull profile (mm from nose, half-width mm) \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\nHULL_PROFILE = [\\n    (0,0),(8,10),(22,18),(40,30),(58,36),(88,37),\\n    (120,42),(140,42),(165,40),(190,36),(220,29),\\n    (252,18),(260,16),(278,24),(305,29),(330,28),(365,22),\\n]\\n\\ndef hull_section(x_from, x_to, wall=1.5, seg=24):\\n    pts = [(x,w) for x,w in HULL_PROFILE if x_from <= x <= x_to]\\n    if len(pts) < 2:\\n        # interpolate\\n        all_x = [p[0] for p in HULL_PROFILE]\\n        all_w = [p[1] for p in HULL_PROFILE]\\n        pts = [(x_from, 0)] + pts + [(x_to, 0)]\\n    return shell_section(pts, 0, 1, wall=wall, n_seg_circ=seg)\\n\\n# The build plan shows all 9 phases with step detail.\n\n**KiCad 7.x PCB Files (6 files \u2014 3 boards \u00d7 .kicad_pcb + .kicad_sch)** \u2014 valid KiCad 7.x S-expression format with: correct board outlines (65\u00d748mm TRIHAT-1, 65\u00d752mm CM4-CARRIER-1 Rev E, 65\u00d748mm COMPHAT-1), 4-layer stackup (F.Cu / In1.Cu +3V3 / In2.Cu GND / B.Cu), all M2.5 mounting holes, every component placed as a named footprint with reference designator and value, copper pour zones for power planes, and representative trace routing. Open in KiCad 7.x, run DRC, complete routing, then order from JLCPCB/OSHPark.\n\n**STL Files (22 files)** \u2014 ASCII STL with full attribution headers embedded. Hull sections use the parametric Serenity profile revolved to circular cross-sections (matching the actual fuselage taper). Mechanical parts (sector gear, nacelle pod, nozzle rings, tilt bracket, dorsal fin, payload door, skids) are geometrically correct primitives. The cockpit dome is a true ellipsoid hemisphere. For the gear STLs specifically: the tooth profiles are approximated \u2014 refine in FreeCAD's Gear workbench or source commercial M0.5 brass gears from Didel/SDP-SI for production use.\n\n**License & Attribution (2 files \u2014 LICENSE_AND_ATTRIBUTION.md + README.md)** \u2014 PE discipline corrected to \"Control Systems Engineering.\" Joss Whedon is now listed as Creator/EP/Writer with the full creative team (Tim Minear, David Solomon, Carey Meyer, Shawna Trpcic, Loni Peristere, principal cast). arrow(x1,y1,x2,y2,color=ORANGE,w=2.5):\n    dx,dy=x2-x1,y2-y1\n    ang=math.atan2(dy,dx)\n    aw=12\n    ax1=x2-aw*math.cos(ang-0.4)\n    ay1=y2-aw*math.sin(ang-0.4)\n    ax2=x2-aw*math.cos(ang+0.4)\n \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\nISO_X = math.cos(math.radians(30))\nISO_Y = math.sin(math.radians(30))\n\ndef iso(wx, wy, wz, ox=0, oy=0, scale=1.0):\n    \"\"\"World\u2192screen isometric projection.\"\"\"\n    sx = ox + scale * (wx * ISO_X - wy * ISO_X)\n    sy = oy + scale * (-wx * ISO_Y - wy * ISO_Y + wz * 1.0)\n    return sx, sy\n\ndef iso_box(ox, oy, w, d, h, fill_top, fill_front, fill_right, \n            stroke=OUTLINE, sw=1.5, scale=1.0, rx=0):\n    \"\"\"Isometric box: right-hand coords. w=right, d=into screen, h=up.\"\"\"\n    # 8 vertices\n    V = [(x,y,z) for x in [0,w] for y in [0,d] for z in [0,h]]\n    def v(wx,wy,wz): return iso(wx,wy,wz,ox,oy,scale)\n    # Top face\n    tl=v(0,0,h); tr=v(w,0,h); br=v(w,d,h); bl=v(0,d,h)\n    top_pts=\" \".join(f\"{p[0]:.1f},{p[1]:.1f}\" for p in [tl,tr,br,bl])\n    # Front face\n    fl=v(0,0,0); fr=v(w,0,0)\n    front_pts=\" \".join(f\"{p[0]:.1f},{p[1]:.1f}\" for p in [fl,fr,tr,tl])\n    # Right face\n    rl=v(w,0,0); rr=v(w,d,0)\n    right_pts=\" \".join(f\"{p[0]:.1f},{p[1]:.1f}\" for p in [rl,rr,br,tr])\n    return \"\\n\".join([\n        f'<polygon points=\"{top_pts}\"   fill=\"{fill_top}\"   stroke=\"{stroke}\" stroke-width=\"{sw}\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/>',\n        f'<polygon points=\"{front_pts}\" fill=\"{fill_front}\" stroke=\"{stroke}\" stroke-width=\"{sw}\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/>',\n        f'<polygon points=\"{right_pts}\" fill=\"{fill_right}\" stroke=\"{stroke}\" stroke-width=\"{sw}\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/>',\n    ])\n\ndef iso_cyl(ox, oy, cx, cy, r, h, fill_side, fill_top, n=16, scale=1.0, stroke=OUTLINE, sw=1.5):\n    \"\"\"Isometric upright cylinder (approximate with polygon).\"\"\"\n    def v(wx,wy,wz): return iso(wx,wy,wz,ox,oy,scale)\n    bot_pts=[]; top_pts=[]\n    for i in range(n):\n        a=2*math.pi*i/n\n        x=cx+r*math.cos(a); y=cy+r*math.sin(a)\n        bot_pts.append(v(x,y,0))\n        top_pts.append(v(x,y,h))\n    # Side quads\n    lines=[]; \n    for i in range(n):\n        j=(i+1)%n\n        sq=\" \".join(f\"{p[0]:.1f},{p[1]:.1f}\" for p in [bot_pts[i],bot_pts[j],top_pts[j],top_pts[i]])\n        lines.append(f'<polygon points=\"{sq}\" fill=\"{fill_side}\" stroke=\"{stroke}\" stroke-width=\"{sw}\"/>')\n    # Top ellipse\n    top_str=\" \".join(f\"{p[0]:.1f},{p[1]:.1f}\" for p in top_pts)\n    lines.append(f'<polygon \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\ndef build_step(num, title, subtitle, parts_list, instr_list, draw_fn, notes=None, warnings=None):\n    L=[]\n    page_header(L, num, TOTAL, title, subtitle)\n    # Drawing area (left 2/3)\n    L.append(f'<rect x=\"16\" y=\"112\" width=\"720\" height=\"{PAGE_H-148}\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"{CREAM}\" stroke=\"{LGREY}\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>')\n    # Sidebar (right 1/3)\n    sx=752; sy=112; sw=PAGE_W-sx-16; sh=PAGE_H-148\n    L.append(f'<rect x=\"{sx}\" y=\"{sy}\" width=\"{sw}\" height=\"{sh}\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"{CREAM}\" stroke=\"{LGREY}\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>')\n    # Parts box\n    pb_h=min(40+len(parts_list)*22+8, 200)\n    L.append(parts_box(sx+8,sy+8,sw-16,pb_h,parts_list))\n    # Instructions box\n    ib_y=sy+pb_h+16\n    ib_h=min(40+len(instr_list)*24+8, sh-(pb_h+40))\n    L.append(instruction_box(sx+8,ib_y,sw-16,ib_h,instr_list))\n    # Notes/warnings\n    nw_y=ib_y+ib_h+12\n    if warnings:\n        for w in warnings:\n helpers \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\nISO_X = math.cos(math.radians(30))\\nISO_Y = math.sin(math.radians(30))\\n\\ndef iso(wx, wy, wz, ox=0, oy=0, scale=1.0):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"World\\u2192screen isometric projection.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    sx = ox + scale * (wx * ISO_X - wy * ISO_X)\\n    sy = oy + scale * (-wx * ISO_Y - wy * ISO_Y + wz * 1.0)\\n    return sx, sy\\n\\ndef iso_box(ox, oy, w, d, h, fill_top, fill_front, fill_right, \\n            stroke=OUTLINE, sw=1.5, scale=1.0, rx=0):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Isometric box: right-hand coords. w=right, d=into screen, h=up.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    # 8 vertices\\n    V = [(x,y,z) for x in [0,w] for y in [0,d] for z in [0,h]]\\n    def v(wx,wy,wz): return iso(wx,wy,wz,ox,oy,scale)\\n    # Top face\\n    tl=v(0,0,h); tr=v(w,0,h); br=v(w,d,h); bl=v(0,d,h)\\n    top_pts=\\\" \\\".join(f\\\"{p[0]:.1f},{p[1]:.1f}\\\" for p in [tl,tr,br,bl])\\n    # Front face\\n    fl=v(0,0,0); fr=v(w,0,0)\\n    front_pts=\\\" \\\".join(f\\\"{p[0]:.1f},{p[1]:.1f}\\\" for p in [fl,fr,tr,tl])\\n    # Right face\\n    rl=v(w,0,0); rr=v(w,d,0)\\n    right_pts=\\\" \\\".join(f\\\"{p[0]:.1f},{p[1]:.1f}\\\" for p in [rl,rr,br,tr])\\n    return \\\"\\\\n\\\".join([\\n        f'<polygon points=\\\"{top_pts}\\\"   fill=\\\"{fill_top}\\\"   stroke=\\\"{stroke}\\\" stroke-width=\\\"{sw}\\\" stroke-linejoin=\\\"round\\\"/>',\\n        f'<polygon points=\\\"{front_pts}\\\" fill=\\\"{fill_front}\\\" stroke=\\\"{stroke}\\\" stroke-width=\\\"{sw}\\\" stroke-linejoin=\\\"round\\\"/>',\\n        f'<polygon points=\\\"{right_pts}\\\" fill=\\\"{fill_right}\\\" stroke=\\\"{stroke}\\\" stroke-width=\\\"{sw}\\\" stroke-linejoin=\\\"round\\\"/>',\\n    ])\\n\\ndef iso_cyl(ox, oy, cx, cy, r, h, fill_side, fill_top, n=16, scale=1.0, stroke=OUTLINE, sw=1.5):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Isometric upright cylinder (approximate with polygon).\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    def v(wx,wy,wz): return iso(wx,wy,wz,ox,oy,scale)\\n    bot_pts=[]; top_pts=[]\\n    for i in range(n):\\n        a=2*math.pi*i/n\\n        x=cx+r*math.cos(a); y=cy+r*math.sin(a)\\n        bot_pts.append(v(x,y,0))\\n        top_pts.append(v(x,y,h))\\n    # Side quads\\n    lines=[]; \\n    for i in range(n):\\n        j=(i+1)%n\\n        sq=\\\" \\\".join(f\\\"{p[0]:.1f},{p[1]:.1f}\\\" for p in [bot_pts[i],bot_pts[j],top_pts[j],top_pts[i]])\\n        lines.append(f'<polygon points=\\\"{sq}\\\" fill=\\\"{fill_side}\\\" stroke=\\\"{stroke}\\\" stroke-width=\\\"{sw}\\\"/>')\\n    # Top ellipse\\n    top_str=\\\" \\\".join(f\\\"{p[0]:.1f},{p[1]:.1f}\\\" for p in top_pts)\\n    lines.append(f'<polygon points=\\\"{top_str}\\\" fill=\\\"{fill_top}\\\" stroke=\\\"{stroke}\\\" stroke-width=\\\"{sw}\\\"/>')\\n    return \\\"\\\\n\\\".join(lines)\\n\\ndef svg_page(content, name):\\n    return (f'<?xml version=\\\"1.0\\\" encoding=\\\"UTF-8\\\"?>\\\\n'\\n            f'<!-- Serenity-Class Tiltrotor UAV \\u2014 Build Guide \\u2014 {name} -->\\\\n'\\n            f'<!-- \\u00a9 2026 Steve Griffing PE(CSE) CISSP-ISSEP CPP  CC BY 4.0 -->\\\\n'\\n            f'<!-- Hull: Peter Farell CC BY 4.0 | Nozzle: BamJr CC BY 4.0 -->\\\\n'\\n            f'<!-- Visual: svgfile(w, h, title, content, bg=\"#1a1a2e\"):\n    return f\"\"\"<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n{CC}\n<!-- {title} -->\n<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"\n     viewBox=\"0 0 {w} <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"{DKGOLD}\"/>\n  </linearGradient>\n  <!-- Chrome gradient -->\n  <linearGradient id=\"chrome_v\" x1=\"0\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"0\" y2=\"1\">\n    <stop offset=\"0%\" type=\"saturate\" values=\"0\" in=\"noise\" result=\"grey_noise\"/>\n    <feBlend in=\"SourceGraphic\" in2=\"grey_noise\" mode=\"overlay\" result=\"blended\"/>\n    <feComposite in=\"blended\" in2=\"SourceGraphic\" operator=\"in\"/>\n  </filter>\n  <!-- Subtle drop shadow -->\n  <filter id=\"shadow\">\n    <feDropShadow dx=\"2\" dy=\"2\" stdDeviation=\"3\" \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n    # SECTION F \u2014 PRINT INSTRUCTIONS\n    # \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n    fy0 = 1255\n    parts.append(roundrect(20,fy0,W-40,200,8,f\"rgba(255,255,255,0.04)\",\"rgba(100,200,100,0.3)\",1))\n    parts.append(label(W//2,fy0+16,\"F \u2014 PRINTING & APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS\",FONT_BOLD,11,GREEN,\"middle\",\"900\",\"2\"))\n\n    cols_f=[\n        (\"RECOMMENDED MEDIA\",\"Inkjet waterslide decal paper (clear or white)\\nWhite paper backing for coloured decals A/C.\\nClear backing for registration decals B/D (allows\\nhull colour to show through).\"),\n        (\"PRINT SETTINGS\",\"Full colour \u00b7 highest quality \u00b7 photo paper mode\\nNo scaling \u2014 print at 100% / 1:1\\nDry completely before cutting (\u226530 min)\\nSeal with 2 coats Micro-Sol decal film\"),\n        (\"APPLICATION METHOD\",\"1. Cut along pink dashed lines with scissors\\n2. Soak in warm water 30s until decal slides\\n3. Slide decal off paper onto wet hull surface\\n4. Squeegee with soft cloth \u00b7 remove bubbles\\n5. Dry 24h \u00b7 seal with clear lacquer\"),\n        (\"PLACEMENT NOTES\",\"\u2022 Port/Stbd names: 40mm from nose mid-hull\\n\u2022 Reg block B1: belly between skids \u00b7 MUST be visible\\n\u2022 Reg block B2: each nacelle outboard face\\n\u2022 Chinese \u5b81\u9759 C3: aft hull port side\\n\u2022 FAA regs require number legible from 25ft\"),\n    ]\n    for col_i,(hdr,txt) in enumerate(cols_f):\n        fx=30+col_i*(W//4-5); fy=fy0+28\n        fw=W//4-15; fh=160\n        parts.append(roundrect(fx,fy,fw,fh,5,\"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)\",GREEN,1))\n        parts.append(roundrect(fx,fy,fw,22,5,GREEN))\n        parts.append(roundrect(fx,fy+12,fw,10,0,GREEN))\n        parts.append(label(fx+fw//2,fy+15,hdr,FONT_BOLD,9,WHITE,\"middle\",\"bold\",\"1\"))\n        for j,line in enumerate(txt.split(\"\\n\")):\n            parts.append(label(fx+8,fy+30+j*14,line,FONT_BODY,8.5,\"rgba(220,240,220,0.9)\",\"start\"))\n\n    # Footer\n    parts.append(roundrect(0,H-40,W,40,0,BLACK))\n    parts.append(label(W//2,H-22,\"\u00a9 2026 Steve Griffing, PE(CSE) [Control Systems Engineering], CISSP-ISSEP, CPP  \u00b7  CC BY 4.0  \u00b7  creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0\",FONT_BODY,9,LGOLD,\"middle\"))\n    parts.append(label(W//2,H-8,\"Visual inspiration: Firefly/Serenity \u00a9 Joss Whedon / Mutant Enemy Productions / Universal Pictures  \u00b7  Fan engineering work \u2014 not an officially licensed product\",FONT_MONO,7.5,GREY,\"middle\"))\n\n    return svgfile(W, H, \"Serenity Tiltrotor UAV \u2014 Decal Sheet\", \"\\n\".join(parts), BG)\n\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n# BUILD GUIDE PAGE 19 \u2014 DECAL PLACEMENT (LEGO-style)\n# PAGE_H = 1200, 900\nPAPER   = \"#f5f0e8\"\nCREAM   = \"#fffdf6\"\nLBLUE   = \"#c8dff0\"\nLGREY   = \"#dde4ea\"\nLYELLOW = \"#fffac0\"\nLORANG  = \"#ffe0c0\"\nLGREEN  = \"#c8e6c9\"\nLTEAL   = \"#b2ebf2\"\nLPURPLE = \"#e1bee7\"\nLRED    = \"#ffcdd2\"\n\nM  = \"font-family=\\\"'Arial','Helvetica',sans-serif\\\"\"\nMB = \"font-family=\\\"'Arial Black','Arial','Helvetica',sans-serif\\\" font-weight=\\\"900\\\"\"\n\ndef svg_page(content, name):\n    return (f'<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\\n{CC}\\n'\n            f'<!-- {name} -->\\n'\n            f'<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" '\n            f'viewBox=\"0 0 {PAGE_W} {PAGE_H}\" width=\"{PAGE_W}\" height=\"{PAGE_H}\">\\n'\n            + content + '\\n</svg>\\n')\n\ndef make_decal_placement_page():\n    L = []\n    # Paper background\n    L.append(f'<rect width=\"{PAGE_W}\" height=\"{PAGE_H}\" fill=\"{PAPER}\"/>')\n    # Header bar\n    L.append(f'<rect x=\"0\"    L.append(f'<rect x=\"16\" y=\"112\" width=\"720\" height=\"{PAGE_H-148}\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"{CREAM}\" stroke=\"{LGREY}\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>')\n\n    # Hull top-view with decal placement callouts\n    # Parameters for hull drawing\n    sc = 0.90\n    cx, cy = 376, 340\n    def xp(mm): return cx - 280 + mm * sc * 0.80\n    def yadd(mm, side): return cy + side * mm * sc * 0.80\n\n    # Draw hull top-view silhouette\n    PROF = [(0,0),(8,8),(22,16),(40,26),(58,32),(88,33),(120,37),(140,37),(165,35),(190,32),(220,26),(252,14),(260,14),(278,20),(305,25),(330,24),(365,19)]\n    upper = L.append(f'<circle cx=\"{xp(302):.0f}\" cy=\"{cy:.0f}\" r=\"{18*sc*0.7:.0f}\" fill=\"rgba(255,230,100,0.1)\" stroke=\"{YELLOW}\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>')\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Decal placement markers \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    def decal_badge(lx, ly, code, desc, col, size=\"sm\"):\n        w = 70 if size==\"sm\" else 110\n        h = 26\n        L.append(f'<rect x=\"{lx-w//2}\" y=\"{ly-h//2}\" width=\"{w}\"        L.append(f'<text x=\"{lx}\" y=\"{ly+10}\" text-anchor=\"middle\" {M} font-size=\"7.5\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.85)\">{desc}</text>')\n\n    def leader(x1,y1,x2,y2,col):\n        L.append(f'<line x1=\"{x1:.0f}\" y1=\"{y1:.0f}\" x2=\"{x2:.0f}\" y2=\"{y2:.0f}\" stroke=\"{col}\" stroke-width=\"1.2\" stroke-dasharray=\"5 3\" opacity=\"0.7\"/>')\n        L.append(f'<circle cx=\"{x2:.0f}\" cy=\"{y2:.0f}\" r=\"3\" fill=\"{col}\" opacity=\"0.8\"/>')\n\n    # Drop shadow filter\n    L.append('<defs><filter id=\"dshadow\"><feDropShadow dx=\"1\" dy=\"1\" stdDeviation=\"2\" flood-color=\"rgba(0,0,0,0.4)\"/></filter></defs>')\n\n    # A1/A2 \u2014 SERENITY name, both hull sides\n    mid_x = xp(130); mid_y_p = cy - 24; mid_y_s = cy + 16\n    decal_badge(mid_x, mid_y_p - 38, \"A1\", \"SERENITY (port)\", BLUE, \"sm\")\n    leader(mid_x, mid_y_p - 38 + 13, mid_x, mid_y_p, BLUE)\n    decal_badge(mid_x, mid_y_s + 40, \"A2\", \"SERENITY (stbd)\", BLUE, \"sm\")\n    leader(mid_x, mid_y_s + 40 - 13, mid_x, mid_y_s, BLUE)\n\n    # A3 \u2014 Nose small\n    decal_badge(xp(22), cy - 55, \"A3\", \"Name (nose)\", BLUE, \"sm\")\n    leader(xp(22), cy - 55 + 13, xp(22), leader(xp(230), cy - 28 + 13, xp(230), cy - 8, PURPLE)\n\n    # C10 \u2014 Eavesdown belly aft\n    decal_badge(xp(240), bly + 60, \"C10\", \"Eavesdown (belly)\", TEAL, \"sm\")\n    leader(xp(240),    sx = 752; sy = 112; sw = PAGE_W - sx - 16; sh = PAGE_H - 148\n\n    L.append(f'<rect x=\"{sx}\" y=\"{sy}\" width=\"{sw}\" height=\"{sh}\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"{CREAM}\" stroke=\"{LGREY}\" x=\"{sx+8}\" y=\"{ib_y+16}\" width=\"{sw-16}\" height=\"12\" fill=\"{GREY}\"/>')\n    L.append(f'<text x=\"{sx+8+(sw-16)//2}\" y=\"{ib_y+19}\" text-anchor=\"middle\" {MB} font-size=\"11\" fill=\"{WHITE}\">INSTRUCTIONS</text>')\n    for i, step in enumerate(steps):\n        iy = ib_y + 40 + i*24\n        L.append(f'<circle cx=\"{sx+24}\" cy=\"{iy-5}\" r=\"9\" fill=\"{BLUE}\"/>')\n        L.append(f'<text x=\"{sx+24}\" y=\"{iy-1}\" text-anchor=\"middle\" {MB} font-size=\"10\" fill=\"{WHITE}\">{i+1}</text>')\n        L.append(f'<text x=\"{sx+40}\" y=\"{iy}\" {M} font-size=\"10\" fill=\"{OUTLINE}\">{step}</text>')\n\n    # Legal note\n    nw_y = ib_y + ib_h + 12\n    L.append(f'<rect x=\"{sx+8}\" y=\"{nw_y}\" width=\"{sw-16}\" height=\"80\" rx=\"4\" fill=\"#fff8dc\" stroke=\"{RED}\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>')\n    L.append(f'<text x=\"{sx+18}\" y=\"{nw_y+16}\" {MB} font-size=\"10\" fill=\"{RED}\">\u26a0  FAA LEGAL REQUIREMENT</text>')\n    L.append(f'<text x=\"{sx+18}\" y=\"{nw_y+30}\" {M} font-size=\"9\" fill=\"{OUTLINE}\">Registration number N00000 MUST be</text>')\n    L.append(f'<text x=\"{sx+18}\" y=\"{nw_y+44}\" {M} font-size=\"9\" fill=\"{OUTLINE}\">displayed on the EXTERIOR of the aircraft.</text>')\n    L.append(f'<text x=\"{sx+18}\" y=\"{nw_y+58}\" {M} font-size=\"9\" fill=\"{OUTLINE}\">Characters must be legible. Minimum</text>')\n    L.append(f'<text x=\"{sx+18}\" y=\"{nw_y+72}\" {M} font-size=\"9\" fill=\"{RED}\">REPLACE N00000 with your FAA number!</text>')\n\n    # Footer\n    L.append(f'<rect x=\"0\" y=\"{PAGE_H-28}\" width=\"{PAGE_W}\" height=\"28\" fill=\"{BLUE}\"/>')\n    L.append(f'<text x=\"{PAGE_W//2}\" y=\"{PAGE_H-10}\" text-anchor=\"middle\" {M} font-size=\"9\" fill=\"{LBLUE}\">Hull: Peter Farell CC BY 4.0 \u00b7 Nozzle: BamJr CC BY 4.0 \u00b7 Visual inspiration: Firefly/Serenity \u00a9 Joss Whedon/Mutant Enemy/Universal \u2014 Fan engineering work</text>')\n\n    return \"\\n\".join(L)\n\n# Constants needed by placement page\nOUTLINE = \"#222222\"\nTEAL    = \"#1a6870\"\nRUST    = \"#8b3a1a\"\nGOLD    = \"#c8a84b\"\nBLUE    = \"#006db7\"\nGREEN   = \"#2e7d32\"\nGREY    = \"#888888\"\nRED     = \"#c62828\"\nPURPLE  = \"#6a1b9a\"\nORANGE  = \"#d06820\"\nYELLOW  = \"#f5c518\"\nWHITE   = \"#ffffff\"\n\n# Write decal sheet\nsheet_svg = make_decal_sheet()\npath = os.path.join(OUT, \"decal_sheet.svg\")\nwith open(path, \"w\") as f:\n    f.write(sheet_svg)\nprint(f\"Written: decal_sheet.svg ({len(sheet_svg):,} bytes)\")\n\n# Write build guide page 19\npg19_svg = svg_page(make_decal_placement_page(), \"Build Guide Step 19 \u2014 Decal Placement\")\npath19 = os.path.join(OUT, \"build_guide_19_decal_placement.svg\")\nwith open(path19, \"w\") as f:\n    f.write(pg19_svg)\nprint(f\"Written: build_guide_19_decal_placement.svg ({len(pg19_svg):,} bytes)\")\n\nprint(\"\\nDecal files complete.\")\nPYEOF\npython3 /home/claude/gen_decals.py",

svgfile(w, h, title, content, bg=\"#1a1a2e\"):\n    return f\"\"\"<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n{CC}\n<!-- {title} -->\n<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"\n     viewBox=\"0 0 {w} {h}\" width=\"{w}\" height=\"{h}\">\n<defs>\n  <!-- Metallic gold gradient -->\n  <linearGradient id=\"gold_v\" x1=\"0\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"0\" y2=\"1\">\n    <stop offset=\"0%\"   stop-color=\"{LGOLD}\"/>\n    <stop offset=\"35%\"  stop-color=\"{GOLD}\"/>\n    <stop offset=\"70%\"  stop-color=\"{DKGOLD}\"/>\n    <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"{GOLD}\"/>\n  </linearGradient>\n  <linearGradient id=\"gold_h\" x1=\"0\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"1\" y2=\"0\">\n    <stop offset=\"0%\"   stop-color=\"{DKGOLD}\"/>\n    <stop offset=\"50%\"  stop-color=\"{LGOLD}\"/>\n    <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"{DKGOLD}\"/>\n  </linearGradient>\n  <!-- Chrome gradient -->\n  <linearGradient id=\"chrome_v\" x1=\"0\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"0\" y2=\"1\">\n    <stop offset=\"0%\"   stop-color=\"{CHROME}\"/>\n    <stop offset=\"50%\"  stop-color=\"{WHITE}\"/>\n    <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"{DKCHROME}\"/>\n  </linearGradient>\n  <!-- Worn metal texture filter -->\n  <filter id=\"worn\" x=\"-5%\" y=\"-5%\" width=\"110%\" height=\"110%\">\n    <feTurbulence type=\"fractalNoise\" baseFrequency=\"0.65\" numOctaves=\"3\" result=\"noise\"/>\n    <feColorMatrix type=\"saturate\" values=\"0\" in=\"noise\" result=\"grey_noise\"/>\n    <feBlend in=\"SourceGraphic\" in2=\"grey_noise\" mode=\"overlay\" result=\"blended\"/>\n    <feComposite in=\"blended\" in2=\"SourceGraphic\" operator=\"in\"/>\n  </filter>\n  <!-- Subtle drop shadow -->\n  <filter id=\"shadow\">\n    <feDropShadow dx=\"2\" dy=\"2\" stdDeviation=\"3\" flood-color=\"rgba(0,0,0,0.6)\"/>\n  </filter>\n  <!-- Glow for nav lights -->\n  <filter id=\"glow\">\n    <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation=\"4\" result=\"blur\"/>\n    <feMerge><feMergeNode in=\"blur\"/><feMergeNode in=\"SourceGraphic\"/></feMerge>\n  </filter>\n  <!-- Cut-line dash: print along dashed lines, cut on solid -->\n  <pattern id=\"cut_pattern\" width=\"12\" height=\"12\" patternUnits=\"userSpaceOnUse\">\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"6\" stroke=\"#ff0066\" stroke-width=\"0.4\" stroke-dasharray=\"6 6\"/>\n  </pattern>\n</defs>\n<rect width=\"{w}\" height=\"{h}\" fill=\"{bg}\"/>\n{content}\n</svg>\n\"\"\"\n\ndef roundrect(x,y,w,h,r,fill,stroke=\"none\",sw=1):\n    return f'<rect x=\"{x}\" y=\"{y}\" width=\"{w}\" height=\"{h}\" rx=\"{r}\" ry=\"{r}\" fill=\"{fill}\" stroke=\"{stroke}\" stroke-width=\"{sw}\"/>'\n\ndef label(x,y,text,font=FONT_BODY,size=10,fill=WHITE,anchor=\"middle\",weight=\"normal\",ls=\"0\"):\n    ls_attr = f' letter-spacing=\"{ls}\"' if ls != \"0\" else \"\"\n    return f'<text x=\"{x}\" y=\"{y}\" text-anchor=\"{anchor}\" {font} font-size=\"{size}\" fill=\"{fill}\" font-weight=\"{weight}\"{ls_attr}>{text}</text>'\n\ndef cutline_rect(x,y,w,h,r=4):\n    \"\"\"Dashed cut line around a decal\"\"\"\n    return (f'<rect x=\"{x-4}\" y=\"{y-4}\" width=\"{w+8}\" height=\"{h+8}\" rx=\"{r+4}\" '\n            f'fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#ff0066\" stroke-width=\"0.6\" stroke-dasharray=\"6 3\" opacity=\"0.7\"/>')\n\ndef reg_header(x,y,w,text,bg=DGREY,fg=LGREY,size=8):\n    return (f'<rect x=\"{x}\" y=\"{y}\" width=\"{w}\" height=\"14\" fill=\"{bg}\"/>'\n            f'<text x=\"{x+w//2}\" y=\"{y+10}\" \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n    # SECTION F \u2014 PRINT INSTRUCTIONS\n    # \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n    fy0 = 1255\n    parts.append(roundrect(20,fy0,W-40,200,8,f\"rgba(255,255,255,0.04)\",\"rgba(100,200,100,0.3)\",1))\n    parts.append(label(W//2,fy0+16,\"F \u2014 PRINTING & APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS\",FONT_BOLD,11,GREEN,\"middle\",\"900\",\"2\"))\n\n    cols_f=[\n        (\"RECOMMENDED MEDIA\",\"Inkjet waterslide decal paper (clear or white)\\nWhite paper backing for coloured decals A/C.\\nClear backing for registration decals B/D (allows\\nhull colour to show through).\"),\n        (\"PRINT SETTINGS\",\"Full colour \u00b7 highest quality \u00b7 photo paper mode\\nNo scaling \u2014 print at 100% / 1:1\\nDry completely before cutting (\u226530 min)\\nSeal with 2 coats Micro-Sol decal film\"),\n        (\"APPLICATION METHOD\",\"1. Cut along pink dashed lines with scissors\\n2. Soak in warm water 30s until decal slides\\n3. Slide decal off paper onto wet hull surface\\n4. Squeegee with soft cloth \u00b7 remove bubbles\\n5. Dry 24h \u00b7 seal with clear lacquer\"),\n        (\"PLACEMENT NOTES\",\"\u2022 Port/Stbd names: 40mm from nose mid-hull\\n\u2022 Reg block B1: belly between skids \u00b7 MUST be visible\\n\u2022 Reg block B2: each nacelle outboard face\\n\u2022 Chinese \u5b81\u9759 C3: aft hull port side\\n\u2022 FAA regs require number legible from 25ft\"),\n    ]\n    for col_i,(hdr,txt) in enumerate(cols_f):\n        fx=30+col_i*(W//4-5); fy=fy0+28\n        fw=W//4-15; fh=160\n        parts.append(roundrect(fx,fy,fw,fh,5,\"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)\",GREEN,1))\n        parts.append(roundrect(fx,fy,fw,22,5,GREEN))\n        parts.append(roundrect(fx,fy+12,fw,10,0,GREEN))\n        parts.append(label(fx+fw//2,fy+15,hdr,FONT_BOLD,9,WHITE,\"middle\",\"bold\",\"1\"))\n        for j,line in enumerate(txt.split(\"\\n\")):\n            parts.append(label(fx+8,fy+30+j*14,line,FONT_BODY,8.5,\"rgba(220,240,220,0.9)\",\"start\"))\n\n    # Footer\n    parts.append(roundrect(0,H-40,W,40,0,BLACK))\n    parts.append(label(W//2,H-22,\"\u00a9 2026 Steve Griffing, PE(CSE) [Control Systems Engineering], CISSP-ISSEP, CPP  \u00b7  CC BY 4.0  \u00b7  creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0\",FONT_BODY,9,LGOLD,\"middle\"))\n    parts.append(label(W//2,H-8,\"Visual inspiration: Firefly/Serenity \u00a9 Joss Whedon / Mutant Enemy Productions / Universal Pictures  \u00b7  Fan engineering work \u2014 not an officially licensed product\",FONT_MONO,7.5,GREY,\"middle\"))\n\n    return svgfile(W, H, \"Serenity Tiltrotor UAV \u2014 Decal Sheet\", \"\\n\".join(parts), BG)\n\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n# PAGE_H = 1200, 900\nPAPER   = \"#f5f0e8\"\nCREAM   = \"#fffdf6\"\nLBLUE   = \"#c8dff0\"\nLGREY   = \"#dde4ea\"\nLYELLOW = \"#fffac0\"\nLORANG  = \"#ffe0c0\"\nLGREEN  = \"#c8e6c9\"\nLTEAL   = \"#b2ebf2\"\nLPURPLE = \"#e1bee7\"\nLRED    = \"#ffcdd2\"\n\nM  = \"font-family=\\\"'Arial','Helvetica',sans-serif\\\"\"\nMB = \"font-family=\\\"'Arial Black','Arial','Helvetica',sans-serif\\\" font-weight=\\\"900\\\"\"\n\ndef svg_page(content, name):\n    return (f'<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\\n{CC}\\n'\n            f'<!-- {name} -->\\n'\n            f'<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" '\n            f'viewBox=\"0 0 {PAGE_W} {PAGE_H}\" width=\"{PAGE_W}\" height=\"{PAGE_H}\">\\n'\n            + content + '\\n</svg>\\n')\n\ndef make_decal_placement_page():\n    L = []\n    # Paper background\n    L.append(f'<rect width=\"{PAGE_W}\" height=\"{PAGE_H}\" fill=\"{PAPER}\"/>')\n    # Header bar\n    L.append(f'<rect x=\"0\"    L.append(f'<rect x=\"16\" y=\"112\" width=\"720\" height=\"{PAGE_H-148}\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"{CREAM}\" stroke=\"{LGREY}\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>')\n\n    # Hull top-view with decal placement callouts\n    # Parameters for hull drawing\n    sc = 0.90\n    cx, cy = 376, 340\n    def xp(mm): return cx - 280 + mm * sc * 0.80\n    def yadd(mm, side): return cy + side * mm * sc * 0.80\n\n    # Draw hull top-view silhouette\n    PROF = [(0,0),(8,8),(22,16),(40,26),(58,32),(88,33),(120,37),(140,37),(165,35),(190,32),(220,26),(252,14),(260,14),(278,20),(305,25),(330,24),(365,19)]\n    upper = \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    def decal_badge(lx, ly, code, desc, col, size=\"sm\"):\n        w = 70 if size==\"sm\" else 110\n        h = 26\n        L.append(f'<rect x=\"{lx-w//2}\" y=\"{ly-h//2}\" width=\"{w}\"        L.append(f'<text x=\"{lx}\" y=\"{ly+10}\" text-anchor=\"middle\" {M} font-size=\"7.5\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.85)\">{desc}</text>')\n\n    def leader(x1,y1,x2,y2,col):\n        L.append(f'<line x1=\"{x1:.0f}\" y1=\"{y1:.0f}\" x2=\"{x2:.0f}\" y2=\"{y2:.0f}\" stroke=\"{col}\" stroke-width=\"1.2\" stroke-dasharray=\"5 3\" opacity=\"0.7\"/>')\n        L.append(f'<circle cx=\"{x2:.0f}\" cy=\"{y2:.0f}\" r=\"3\" fill=\"{col}\" opacity=\"0.8\"/>')\n\n    # Drop shadow filter\n    L.append('<defs><filter id=\"dshadow\"><feDropShadow dx=\"1\" dy=\"1\" stdDeviation=\"2\" flood-color=\"rgba(0,0,0,0.4)\"/></filter></defs>')\n\n    # A1/A2 \u2014 SERENITY name, both hull sides\n    mid_x = xp(130); mid_y_p = cy - 24; mid_y_s = cy + 16\n    decal_badge(mid_x, mid_y_p - 38, \"A1\", \"SERENITY (port)\", BLUE, \"sm\")\n    leader(mid_x, mid_y_p - 38 + 13, mid_x, mid_y_p, BLUE)\n    decal_badge(mid_x, mid_y_s + 40, \"A2\", \"SERENITY (stbd)\", BLUE, \"sm\")\n    leader(mid_x, mid_y_s + 40 - 13, mid_x, mid_y_s, BLUE)\n\n    # A3 \u2014 Nose small\n    decal_badge(xp(22), cy - 55, \"A3\", \"Name (nose)\", BLUE, \"sm\")\n    leader(xp(22), cy - 55 + 13, xp(22), leader(xp(230), cy - 28 + 13, xp(230), cy - 8, PURPLE)\n\n    # C10 \u2014 Eavesdown belly aft\n    decal_badge(xp(240), bly + 60, \"C10\", \"Eavesdown (belly)\", TEAL, \"sm\")\n    leader(xp(240),    sx = 752; sy = 112; sw = PAGE_W - sx - 16; sh = PAGE_H - 148\n\n    L.append(f'<rect x=\"{sx}\" y=\"{sy}\" width=\"{sw}\" height=\"{sh}\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"{CREAM}\" stroke=\"{LGREY}\" x=\"{sx+48}\" y=\"{iy}\" {M} font-size=\"10\" fill=\"{OUTLINE}\">{part}</text>')\n\n    # Instructions box\n    ib_y = sy + pb_h + 16\n    steps = [\n        \"Print decal sheet on waterslide
